creator: fluffy@FreeBSD.org
text:
net/openswitch: 
001 repocopy to net/openswitch => net/openswitch-lts
002 update net/openswitch-lts to 2.17.6 LTS release
003 update net/openswitch to 3.1.1 release

Patches prepared for 'git am' 

https://people.freebsd.org/~fluffy/-patches/0001-net-openswitch-lts-copy-from-openswitch-before-it-go.patch
https://people.freebsd.org/~fluffy/-patches/0002-net-openvswitch-lts-update-to-2.17.6-LTS-release.patch
https://people.freebsd.org/~fluffy/-patches/0003-net-openvswitch-update-to-3.1.1-release.patch
